# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Users can control the top-to-bottom order of images shown on the public hosted page.

## Success Criteria

- Saved images can be reordered in the editor.
- Reordering marks the editor as having unsaved changes.
- Save persists the order.
- Public pages display images in the saved order.

## UX Notes

Use native drag and drop with a simple reorder hint/handle.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

Native drag-and-drop is basic on touch devices; deeper mobile polish can follow later.
